metadata.description: Disposition ledger for Open English WordNet part-of-speech candidates that are not currently represented in the bundled dictionary.
metadata.policy: Do not add a new part-of-speech entry unless an independent Traditional Chinese definition and suitable example are available from a redistributable source. This ledger suppresses already-reviewed OEWN-only candidates from the audit queue.

resolutions.reason: The candidate overlaps with a function-word, article, pronoun, conjunction, preposition, or proper-name entry; no new entry is added without an exact Traditional Chinese source.
resolutions.source: Open English WordNet part-of-speech comparison via audit_dictionary.py

resolutions.reason: OEWN indicates the headword may have this additional part of speech, but no independent Traditional Chinese definition/example source is available in the current open-data build. Existing entries are preserved.
